candidates.why: Best match for total top-line revenue/sales; includes goods/services plus other business-related activity where present.
Core revenue line and useful fallback if the broader business activities total is unavailable in some years.

variables.notes: Used as priority list, not a sum. Preferred the broader total revenue concept over the narrower goods/services line.

candidates.why: Direct cost-of-sales style line and best single COGS measure.
Duplicate-looking total of cost of revenues, but less preferred than the direct operating revenue cost line.
Excludes depreciation and mirrors material costs, but is less standard than the reported cost-of-revenue line.

variables.notes: Chose the direct reported cost-of-revenue line and avoided duplicate total rows/components.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A row, populated, and therefore preferred as the sole SG&A selection under the hierarchy.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses including Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Overhead component within SG&A, but less preferred because an explicit SG&A row exists.
Too broad and includes COGS; not appropriate when explicit SG&A exists.

variables.notes: OK. CR:c|high|missing. Explicit SG&A row exists and is populated, so selected only that row. Did not add labor component to avoid double counting. Label indicates R&D is excluded.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: This is not an R&D expense row; it only indicates SG&A excludes R&D.
Balance-sheet asset line, not income-statement R&D expense.
Balance-sheet asset line, not income-statement R&D expense.

variables.notes: No dedicated R&D expense line appears on the income statement. Balance-sheet R&D cost rows are not expense measures, so XRD is left empty.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Best recurring financing cost line; more direct and granular than net finance total.
Appears to duplicate the same interest expense values; kept as secondary only.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supple
candidates.why: Recurring interest component, but likely already included in total interest expense so adding it risks double counting.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Preferred the most direct recurring interest expense line and avoided adding lease-interest supplemental to prevent double counting.

candidates.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
candidates.why: Best book equity measure because it explicitly excludes non-controlling interests.

candidates.row_label: Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders
candidates.why: Equivalent owner-attributable equity line and good fallback.
Also matches owner equity here, but explicit attributable-to-parent wording is preferred.

final_choice.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders

variables.notes: Used owner/parent-attributable equity to avoid double counting with MIB. Priority list, not a sum.

candidates.row_label: Total Shareholders' Equity - including Minority Interest & Hybrid Debt
candidates.why: Not suitable for MIB because it is a total equity line, not a standalone non-controlling interest row.
Income statement flow line, not a balance-sheet minority interest stock measure.
Income statement flow line, not a balance-sheet minority interest stock measure.

variables.notes: No standalone minority interest/non-controlling interest balance-sheet row is present. Since BE uses parent-attributable equity, MIB is set to empty.
